summary: Completed testing of 3 bug fixes for Iteration 8. All fixes verified working. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright. Critical: 2028 case does NOT appear in Expiring Soon section.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - Recharts rendering before container has dimensions. Not affecting functionality.

fix_1_date_inputs_max_9999: CaseDetail.js: All 5 date inputs in Dates tab have max='9999-12-31'
CaseDetail.js: Commission Paid Date input has max='9999-12-31'
Cases.js: All 4 date inputs in New Case form have max='9999-12-31'
ClientDetail.js: Add Applicant DOB has max='9999-12-31'
Clients.js: Add Client form additional applicant DOB has max='9999-12-31'
fix_2_additional_applicant_fields: Clients.js Add Client: Additional Applicant section has First Name + Surname (NOT Full Name)
Clients.js Add Client: Additional Applicant section has Income field
Clients.js Add Client: Additional Applicant section has Employment Type dropdown
ClientDetail.js Add Applicant Dialog: Has First Name, Surname, DOB, Email, Phone, Income, Employment Type
ClientDetail.js: Applicant display shows First Name, Surname, Income, Employment Type
Backend: POST /api/clients with additional_applicants correctly stores first_name, last_name, income, employment_type
fix_3_expiring_soon_6_months: Backend /api/dashboard/retention: Returns 0 cases with 2028 expiry dates
Dashboard UI: Shows '1 products in 6 months' text
Dashboard UI: Shows only 2026-03 in Expiring Soon section
Dashboard UI: 2028 case (case_04649caf1b1b, expiry 2028-04-15) does NOT appear in Expiring Soon
regression_case_creation: Backend: POST /api/cases creates mortgage case successfully
Backend: Case with loan_amount, lender_name, status returns correct data
Frontend: New Case form works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Date inputs consistently have max='9999-12-31' to prevent 5-digit years
GOOD: Additional Applicant correctly uses first_name + last_name (not full_name)
GOOD: Backend retention endpoint uses timedelta(days=180) for accurate 6-month filtering
VERIFIED: case_04649caf1b1b (2028-04-15 expiry) correctly excluded from Expiring Soon
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified working: (1) Date inputs have max='9999-12-31' across CaseDetail, Cases, ClientDetail, Clients pages to prevent 5-digit years. (2) Additional Applicant form uses first_name + last_name (not full_name) plus income and employment_type fields in both Clients.js Add Client form and ClientDetail.js Add Applicant dialog. (3) Expiring Soon dashboard section shows ONLY cases expiring within 6 months - confirmed case_04649caf1b1b (2028-04-15) does NOT appear. Backend retention endpoint at /api/dashboard/retention uses timedelta(days=180).
